title: Dedicated Power
description: Gives the dedicated server interface a new look for easier server management and more power over your server.
body:
**This mod completely overhauls the default Minecraft dedicated server GUI, giving you more power over your server.**

# Key Features
### Enhanced Console & Log System
- Log Filtering: Filter logs by type (INFO, WARN, ERROR, DEBUG, CHAT)
- Search Feture: Instantly search through log entries
- Command Autocomplete: Tab-completion for all Minecraft commands
- Command History: Navigate through previous commands with arrow keys
- Export Logs: Save your logs to a files

### Advanced Player Management

- Player List: See all online players with their skins
- Player Statistics: View ping, health, hunger, and game mode at a glance
- Player Actions: Quick access to kick, ban, message, and op/deop players
- Search & Sort: Find players quickly with search and sort by name, ping, or game mode
- Ban Management: Full ban list interface with easy unban's
- Whitelist Manager: Add/remove players from whitelist with a simple GUI

### Real-time Performance Monitoring

- Live Graphs: Real-time graphs for memory usage and tick performance
- TPS Monitoring: TPS display with color-coded warnings
- Entity & Chunk Count: Track loaded entities and chunks across all dimensions
- Memory Usage: Monitor JVM memory with detailed statistics
- Interactive Tooltips: Hover over graphs for detailed information
- Uptime Tracker: See how long your server has been running

### Comprehensive Server Controls

Server Menu:

- Edit server.properties directly from the GUI
- Change difficulty and default game mode instantly
- Manage whitelist settings
- One-click world saving
- Automated backup creation (with zip compression)

World Menu:

- Quick time control (day, night, custom times)
- Weather management (clear, rain, thunder)
- Game Rules Editor
- Player & Mob management
- World border settings
- Force save and chunk reloading
- Individual world backups
- World information display

Performance Menu:

- Clear entities by type (items, hostile mobs, all mobs)
- Optimize chunks
- Force garbage collection
- Generate thread dumps for debugging
- Full performance reports with system info

Tools Menu:

- Command palette (Ctrl+Shift+P) for quick command execution
- Datapack manager
- Resource pack configuration
- Server icon uploader
- Future: Scheduled tasks and RCON support

Help Menu:

- Built-in command reference
- Keyboard shortcuts guide
- System information display
- Direct links to Minecraft Wiki

### Keyboard Shortcuts

- Ctrl+S - Save all worlds
- Ctrl+Shift+P - Open command palette
- F1 - Show keyboard shortcuts
- Tab - Autocomplete commands
- Up/Down - Navigate command history
- Esc - Clear suggestions


# FAQ
- **Q: Does this work on the client?** No, this mod is designed specifically for dedicated servers. It replaces the server GUI.
- **Q: Will this work with existing servers?** Yes! Just install it like any other mod. Your world data is completely safe.
- **Q: Does this affect server performance?** No! The GUI runs on separate threads and has minimal impact on server performance.
- **Q: Can I use this with other mods?** A: Absolutely! It's compatible with all server-side mods.

# 🐛 Bug Reports
Found a bug? Please report it on our [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/SuperSirvu/DedicatedPower/issues) page!

# 💖 Support the Project
If you enjoy this mod, please:

- ⭐ Star the project on GitHub
- 📢 Share it with other server admins
- 💬 Leave feedback and suggestions
- 🐛 Report bugs to help improve it

---

**Made by SuperSirvu**
